## What does this PR do?
- Brief explanation of the feature/fix

## Why is this needed?
- Problem being solved

## Changes made
- Bullet list of key changes

## How to test
- Steps to verify

## Screenshots (if UI)
- Attach if applicable


---

## Commit Message Compliance (MANDATORY)

All commits in this PR MUST follow:

type: short description

OR (recommended):
type(scope): short description

### Allowed Types:
- feat
- fix
- chore
- refactor
- docs
- style
- test
- perf
- build
- ci
- revert
- init
- config

### Rules:
- lowercase only
- under 72 characters
- present tense
- specific (no vague messages)

### Examples:
- feat(auth): add JWT login
- fix(api): handle null response
- refactor(ui): clean dashboard layout

---

## Checklist
- [ ] PR follows required structure
- [ ] Commit messages follow handbook rules
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
- [ ] Branch created from `dev`
- [ ] Ready for review
